name: Thomas Andre
mainAbility: Body Enhancement / Superhuman Strength / Hand-to-hand Combat / Telekinesis

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Cold-blooded Pummel
basic.description: Thomas attacks the enemies in front of himself mercilessly, dealing Light elemental damage.

core.name: Gigantic Hammer Slam
core.description: Thomas strikes downward with his fist like it's a hammer. Knocks down target. Grants 2% Defense Shield during use.

skill.name: Absolute Demolition
skill.description: Thomas swings his fists quickly and strikes mercilessly. Final hit inflicts Airborne. Grants 2% Defense Shield.

skill.name: Colossal Crush
skill.description: Thomas leaps and strikes downward at enemies with wolf-shaped energy blast. Knocks down target. Grants 2% Defense Shield.

support.name: Return of the King
support.description: Thomas leaps into the air and strikes downward with wolf-shaped energy blast. Grants entire team Steel Armor (25s): +10% Critical Rate/Damage when shield active, +10% Defense Shield.

qte.name: Volley Crash
qte.description: After barrage of forward punches, Thomas powerfully slams the ground. Triggers via Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate, Stun, or Blind. Knocks down target.

ultimate.name: Ruler's Judgement
ultimate.description: Thomas reaches peak destructive power and transforms into embodiment of destruction. Activates Steel Tyrant (30s): Absolute Demolition/Colossal Crush +100% damage, Shield persists 10s, +20% damage reduction, +10% Defense Shield. Changes ultimate to Black Hole Crash (3510–5265% DEF, damage +2% per 1000 Shield, max +20%).

passive.name: Overwhelming Power
passive.description: When activating Absolute Demolition, Colossal Crush, Gigantic Hammer Slam, or Volley Crash, triggers Overwhelming Power (stacks to 5, 25s each): Defense +30%, Shield Acquisition Chance +2%. Ultimate available after 5 stacks (36s cooldown). Team Fight mode: +24% damage.

advancements: Shield Acquisition +8%. Shield active grants +10% Critical Rate/Damage.
Overgrowth when Shield active (0.5s cooldown): 200% DEF Light AoE damage, increases 100% per 1000 Shield (max 1000%). Colossal Crush final hit with Steel Tyrant triggers Overgrowth.
Black Hole Crash damage +125% while Steel Tyrant is active.
